name: healthcare_workplace_injury_spike_harbor_jus_mer
premise: Infection control wants a ward closed; bed management is refusing without a signed surge plan from the county. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare workplace injury spike harbor jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. OR block time and blood-bank release rules create a hard decision point before the next trauma activation window. The trade is not abstract: it is justice versus mercy under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Keisha Chandra
agents.identity: I am Keisha Chandra, the accountable executive on this bridge in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Sato
agents.identity: I am Talia Sato, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Keisha Chandra must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Keisha Chandra do?
